description: Evaluates security awareness and culture maturity—program governance, KPIs/KRIs, leadership and champions, curriculum and delivery, onboarding, phishing simulation, technical and AI-era awareness, psychological safety, and culture measurement.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A formal security awareness and culture program exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise security awareness and culture program exists
Regular program efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Awareness and culture KPIs and KRIs—including training completion, phishing report and click rates, policy acknowledgment, and culture survey scores—are documented and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for security culture
Regular KPI/KRI review
Phishing report and human-risk metrics
Policy acknowledgment and culture survey scores
Training completion and overdue metrics
Phishing simulation click and report rates

capabilities.name: Leadership tone and accountability
capabilities.description: Executive and management leaders model security behavior, communicate expectations, and are held accountable for culture outcomes with quarterly review.
evaluation_focus: Executive tone and visible security leadership
Management accountability for security culture outcomes
Regular leadership culture commitment review

capabilities.name: Leadership, incentives, and champions
capabilities.description: Executive leaders model security behavior, incentives recognize positive behaviors, and a champions program extends culture beyond the security team with quarterly review.
evaluation_focus: Formal security champions or ambassador program
Peer advocacy across business units
Regular champions program review
Rewarding security compliance and positive behaviors
Recognition programs for security contributions

capabilities.name: Curriculum, role-based delivery, and platform
capabilities.description: Security education content is developed proactively, tailored to roles and risk profiles, and delivered through an automated enterprise platform reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Proactive development or sourcing of security education content
Dedicated content creators or vendor partnerships
Regular curriculum review and refresh
Tailored security trainings for specific functional units
Segmented security training for various user groups and risk profiles
Enterprise-wide training delivery platform
Automated assignment, tracking, and reminders
Regular platform configuration and integration review

capabilities.name: Onboarding and mandatory awareness
capabilities.description: New hires and contractors complete mandatory security awareness training before accessing enterprise resources, with quarterly compliance review.
evaluation_focus: Mandatory security awareness for new hires and contractors
Training completion before resource access
Regular compliance review of onboarding training

capabilities.name: Phishing simulation and social engineering drills
capabilities.description: Phishing simulations and social engineering drills run on a defined cadence with remediation for repeat failures and quarterly program review.
evaluation_focus: Regular phishing simulation campaigns
Social engineering drill scenarios beyond email
Remediation for repeat simulation failures

capabilities.name: Technical and AI-era awareness
capabilities.description: Technical roles receive specialized secure-coding and operational training, and all staff receive AI-era and emerging threat awareness refreshed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Secure coding and SDLC training for developers
Administrative and operational security training for IT roles
Regular technical training curriculum review
AI-augmented attack and social engineering awareness
Shadow AI and approved-tool usage training
Regular refresh of emerging-threat training content

capabilities.name: Psychological safety and reporting culture
capabilities.description: Employees feel safe reporting security concerns, near-misses, and mistakes without fear of retaliation, with quarterly culture assessment.
evaluation_focus: Psychological safety for reporting security concerns
No-blame near-miss and mistake reporting
Regular assessment of reporting culture

capabilities.name: Culture measurement and workforce understanding
capabilities.description: Security culture is measured through surveys and behavioral metrics, the workforce understands security rationale, and improvement actions are tracked with quarterly review.
evaluation_focus: Workforce understanding of why security measures exist
Connection between controls and business protection
Regular validation of workforce security understanding
Security culture surveys and behavioral metrics
Feedback loops driving culture improvement actions
Regular culture measurement review and action tracking

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
